requiredCorrections.note: Reduce the disproportionate dead canvas below the interview section to better balance the layout and improve canvas utilization.
Increase contrast or add subtle background highlight behind the POSITION / EXPERIENCE text block to enhance visual hierarchy and candidate attention.

Consider introducing a stronger candidate hook differentiation between the main headline and the subheadline for clearer hierarchy. The current 'Oil & Gas · Bilfinger' line is too subtle and blends with the headline.
